subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath drawn nigh unto the Throne and turned towards God, the Lord of the worlds, that the Call may draw him once again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی العرش و توجه الی الله رب العالمین لیقربه الندآء مره
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for forgiveness
